headline: Charles River Launches Rat In Vitro Fertility Services Demonstrating Embryology Capabilities
summary: WILMINGTON, Mass., April 30, 2026--Charles River Laboratories today announced an enhanced In Vitro Fertility (IVF) service bundle designed to accelerate rat-model programs across therapeutics areas, including oncology, neurology, cardiology, and metabolic. By leveraging embryo transfer, cryopreservation, and colony rederivation, teams can rapidly recover lines, expand cohorts, and safeguard critical genotypes—while reducing downtime caused by breeding bottlenecks.
